holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

holdings.infoBox: BZZ is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Northrop Grumman stock at 8.32%, Teledyne Technologies at 6.24%, Ouster at 5.87%, Unusual Machines at 5.61%, and Joby Aviation at 5.35%.

overview.description: The Corgi Drones & Urban Air Mobility ETF (BZZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund is actively managed and invests in companies involved in drones, unmanned aircraft systems, and urban air mobility technologies, including aircraft developers, autonomy software, aerial infrastructure, and counter-drone systems. The fund aims for growth of capital. BZZ was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
